title: Campīernagar Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Campīernagar with a Z-Score of +3.71. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, scoring 10.0/10 in severity.
body:
The current heat wave in Campīernagar has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature anomaly is causing significant disruptions, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 12.0 GG and no Heating Degree Day (HDD). 
 The relative humidity is at 67% and wind speed is 11.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
